title: Legalics and BMore forge ‘best friends’ alliance to power India-Portugal legal corridor
description: Full-service Indian law firm Legalics and BMore, a Lisbon-based law firm, have announced a strategic ‘best friends’ relationship.The alliance is designed to optimise cross-border legal capabilities and client access to legal and regulatory advice across India and Portugal.While both firms will maintain their operational independence, they will operate as a unified front.Legalics’ clients will gain on-the-ground legal support and local market expertise in Portugal through BMore.
